aljazeera.title: Iran holds funerals for children killed in Minab school strike

monitor_the_situation.title: American B-1 Bombers Head to Iran to Strike Missile Cities
— S4 · Conflict · Tehran, Iran · 4h ago. US B-1 bombers are en route to Iran for airstrikes on missile-related targets, the first such mission since the 40-day war.

US Strikes Iran for 10th Consecutive Night, Hits Bandar Abbas and Qeshm Island; Iran Attacks Kuwait and Jordan, Houthis Threaten Shipping in Bab el-Mandeb Strait, Targeting Saudi Arabia; US Central Co
Iran Strikes US Military Bases in Jordan, Bahrain, and Kuwait
Iran Strikes Radar Installations on Kuwait's Bubiyan Island
— S3 · Conflict · Bubiyan Island, Kuwait · 2h ago. Iranian forces strike radar installations on Bubiyan Island, part of a broader effort to dismantle CENTCOM's radar network in Kuwait.
